programme.desc: It started as an adventure to Cloud 9 for a surfing contest that turns into a cultural expedition and full-blown typhoon chasing surf trip to the northern regions and secret surf breaks of the Philippines. programme.title: Facing Waves Ep802 Paddling the Petawawa River in Ontario, Canada
programme.desc: Host Ken Whiting embarks on a 5-day whitewater wilderness trip down the mighty Petawawa River in Ontario, Canada.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep105: Whale Sharks…Gentle Giants
programme.desc: Whale Sharks, gentle giants of the sea, can reach nearly 50 feet in length and weigh over 30 tons! With space age technology, researchers can identify, catalogue and track individual sharks. In Mexico and Western Australia, whale shark tourism has proven to be both a blessing and a curse. Also featured is the remarkable story of the capture and transport of whale sharks to the Georgia Aquarium in Atlanta.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: Without a Pedal

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Yellow Flickers

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Balance
programme.desc: Legendary professional snowboarder David Carrier-Porcheron reflects on Surf, Skate, and Snow culture, taking a closer look at what brings balance and happiness to people’s lives. Join us for this thoughtful and exhilarating ride with DCP.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. programme.title: Homegrown Hunter TV

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Highlights - Highlights
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we will share with you some of the highlights of some of the best Women's Tournaments of 2019. We went to Florida to enjoy the US Open Women's Championship, across the Atlantic to England for the Staple International between England and Argentina, over to France where we stopped in Saint-Tropez for the Women's International and in Chantilly for the Women's French Open. Then back over to Argentina to enjoy the Pink Polo at Thai Polo Club.

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments
programme.desc: Words speak for themselves. An equestrian show unrivalled anywhere in the world, offering the highest level of performance. The CHIO Aachen is probably the most prestigious horse show in Europe when it comes to show jumping and dressage. Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.title: CHI de Genève - Best Moments
programme.desc: The 59th edition of the CHI de Genève is about to take place at the Palexpo Geneva. The top riders are ready for one of Europe's most demanding courses. They have at stake the Rolex Grand Slam of Show Jumping and a spot at the hall of fame. Relive the best moments of the 2019 edition of the CHI de Genève.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Experience peace and focus with nature footage, soothing piano melodies, and calming sounds from around the world. Let serene landscapes and gentle music guide you to a state of relaxation.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Turn your dull screen into a mesmerizing Vancouver Aquarium! Enjoy the captivating underwater world, with its array of colorful fish and fascinating marine creatures, all set to relaxing music. Let the serene seaweed movements help you unwind and clear your mind.

programme.title: time2rlx Flowers
programme.desc: Enjoy a visual escape into tulip fields, rose gardens, and sunflower plains across three regions, designed to bring nature’s calm and beauty into your space.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: After its introduction the Audi RS6 was the benchmark when it came to extreme estate cars. Its performance was already very impressive, but according to the Audi tuners that still wasn't enough.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention thanks to their ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they’re spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: The island of Rab has a rich history and has been inhabited by numerous great personalities. The Romans named this place Felix Arba or Lucky, which actually means Happy island. With 30 sandy beaches, Rab is truly a happy island and its beauty has been recognized by tourists from around the world for almost 125 years.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik - Orebic
programme.desc: We begin our journey inside Sail-Ho at the most beautiful and magical old city: Dubrovnik. Home to many famous TV series due to its historical and beautiful landscape, we are ready to sail around the Elafiti islands and introduce you to the top quality wines of Pelješac peninsula.

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Rediscover North America
programme.desc: Six friends decide to cross 12 states on their canoe, embarking on the adventure of a lifetime. From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Bloody Streetz
programme.desc: Bloody Streetz is the story of what happens when a ruthless killer for hire runs up against an African spirit and is forced to learn the errors of his ways.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Cut Her Out
programme.desc: Darcy can't purge her mind of the animalistic abuse she suffered as a child at the hands of her mother. Darcy's therapist Ryan discovers that her family homestead has been abandoned.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Tom Sizemore and Eric Roberts in this tense thriller about two FBI agents who track down a missing person's case which leads them to a group of stock brokers who hunt people for sport.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E38 - HM The Queen A Remarkable Life
programme.desc: The most notable woman in modern times has to be our Late Queen, Elizabeth II. She ruled for 70 years, the longest reign in British history. Once a princess who wasn't supposed to be queen, Elizabeth II led the country to thrive after World War II and became a steady presence in our changing world. In a thousand years of British monarchy, Elizabeth II is likely one of the most outstanding monarchs ever.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E06 - Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan. Jim and Corey journey to the Tian Shan mountain range in search of high altitude mountain dwelling sheep and ibex.

programme.title: Wardens - S09:E03 - Serving Warrants and Ice Fishing
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers serve warrants to a suspect believed to have taken at least eighteen deer without licenses.

programme.title: Wardens - S09:E04 - Michigan Bears
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers enforce bear hunting regulations in a variety of ways; the state's DNR uses many methods to track the state's bear numbers.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E03 - Naturally Sustaining
programme.desc: We journey in search of incredible miracles of nature begins on the Canary Islands. Lanzarote is of a volcanic origin. Volcanic activity created a fantastical landscape, similar to that on Mars. On Gran Canarias we will witness a traditional harvest of a crop that has been brought to the rest of the world from here - sugarcane. We will wrap up this episode in the Moroccan province of Gulemin, a home to a nomadic tribe whose inseparable companions are camels.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E04 - Naturally Colourful
programme.desc: Venture into the Mexican seaside state of Veracruz in the south-west of the country and admire the unbelievable colours of locally grown orchids. Find out how vanilla is grown and discover how brown sugar is made. To top things off, witness an extraordinary ritual. Later, we will visit the Cayman Islands in the Caribbean. The three islands are relatively small but are inhabited by some remarkable animals including sea turtles, friendly rays and other types of fish as well as fascinating blue iguanas.

programme.title: Burning Beds
programme.desc: Hamburg's housing shortage forces car inspector Gina and British pyromaniac Harry to move into the same apartment.

programme.title: Adam Ondra: Pushing the Limits
programme.desc: Climber Adam Ondra, best in his field, is known for his fearless, record-breaking ascents. An intimate portrait explores his life beyond the headlines

programme.title: Farewell Halong
programme.desc: For generations, the Nguyen family has lived on and off the water amid breathtaking natural scenery. Now they are threatened with forced resettlement.

programme.title: Floating
programme.desc: A lesbian bachelorette’s night out with "the guys", including, alas, her future sperm donor. A mumblecore comedy on a raft.

programme.title: Home Game
programme.desc: Hometowns, neighborhoods, community spirit, energy security and a lot of money are at stake here.

programme.title: Gisela
programme.desc: Authentic, haphazard and unromantic, three residents of a high-rise housing estate search for love, friendship and sexuality.

programme.title: I Knew You Were My Kind
programme.desc: The ghostly off-season on the Italian coast. Shortly before their journey home, caregivers Anca and Zoya meet at a bus stop and decide to visit a client's abandoned beach house. A fleeting day of vacation becomes a moment of solidarity and tenderness that challenges the structural norms that govern their daily lives.

programme.title: The Smoothness of Our Teeth
programme.desc: A family visit and a broken tooth raises universal questions about identity, origins and life choices.

programme.title: Stained Skin
programme.desc: Despite the adverse working conditions, two friends persevere with the power of their imagination and their will.

programme.title: Atlas
programme.desc: A simple worker gets caught up in the maelstrom of real estate sharks, evictions and clan crime, where humanity often gives way to greed.

programme.title: B
programme.desc: A gay couple plan for a weekend of mischief, baiting the Christian owner of a remote B Events take a deadly turn when another guest arrives, who might have something more sinister in mind.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Blackbird
programme.desc: A rebellious teenager, falsely accused of planning a school massacre, must survive a harrowing conflict with a prison gang leader, while he attempts to prove his innocence.

programme.desc: Rhyme takes on a big role in the musical. Things get spooky at Ace's Halloween party.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: A disastrous double date and a returning leading lady put two relationships in jeopardy.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Everyone comes together for Thanksgiving. The Chicken Girls take on the Queen B's at the Winter Formal.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: A home economics project whips up drama for the girls. One of the Chicken Girls says goodbye to Attaway.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Rhyme accidentally becomes the leader of Attaway's feminist movement.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: The Chicken Girls are fed up with the boys in their lives. Rooney's party prompts break-ups and make-ups.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Quinn invites Rhyme, Luna, and the girls to an escape room. Robbie and the boys have bro-time.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Rhyme takes a hard look at her relationship with Ezra. Rooney considers a new love interest.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Rhyme's cousin, Astrid, revisits her past in Attaway. Rooney begins to question the state of her love life.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Quinn has a tough time moving on after a break-up. Texts shed light on Rooney's dilemma with Stephanie.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Rhyme and Astrid set aside their disagreements. Ellie does her best to help Quinn get over Hamilton.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: GeneproDX is transforming traditional medicine —bridging Health Tech and AI and providing patients with fast, reliable, and accurate diagnostics. GeneproDX’s patented product, ThyroidPrint, provides highly-accurate diagnosis, resulting in fewer unnecessary surgeries — saving patients from life-altering surgical outcomes.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Far UV creates autonomous disinfection devices that can assist in containing the inevitable emergence of infectious diseases that can be spread by pathogens on surfaces or through the air. It is under contract with NASA to prevent foodborne illness in space flight and works with the US Army.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Charlie, Bianca and Anna are on their way to see Dalia, who has fallen off the grid since becoming a mum. While Dalia tries to wrangle herself, a sick child and a grumpy husband.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: FORTE s a female-founded and led technology company. Launched by Lauren Foundos in 2015, FORTE’s white label streaming platform helps boutique fitness studios, big box gyms and health clubs create premium live and on-demand fitness experiences for members.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Suddenly

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: SO BE IT [Full Album]
programme.desc: The official live video for "SO BE IT" by Elevation Worship featuring Tiffany Hudson Chris Brown.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: Move It To The Middle
programme.desc: Stressed, insecure, and stuck — that’s how Moses felt, too. But that wasn’t the end of his story, and it’s not yours, either. It’s just the middle. There’s hope past this chapter, and it’s found by shifting your focus back to God.

programme.title: A Recipe For Resentment
programme.desc: If you’ve been feeling pulled in every direction, it might be time to pivot. God isn’t asking you to do everything — He’s asking you to stay close to Him

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: At the end of the show, Adriana cries when she remembers that she wanted to be a dancer but could not because of her family's humility; César, moved, feels that he loves her more and more.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Summoning up his courage, Carlos Raul opens the door of the warehouse for his brother but is worried to find him lying senseless on the floor.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: They think it is Rosa Blanco who unleashed the war between the families. Mother Isabel thinks of communicating the news to Camila who believes that she is her mother. Ezequiel and Fausto, armed, confront each other.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila goes to meet one of the White Roses to find out more about the girl in the photo who was her little girl and the fate of her mother. She is disappointed because the woman doesn't know anything and this makes her sad.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: As a spoiled and egocentric girl, Abigail tries to win over her teacher Carlos Alfredo. Leonel and his friends convince Abigail to escape from the boarding school with her friends to go dancing, only to be discovered by her father.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Abigail, a spoiled and self-centered girl, tries to win the heart of her teacher Carlos Alfredo. Leonel and his friends convince Abigail to sneak out of the boarding school with her friends to go dancing, only to be discovered by her father.

programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Piensan que es Rosa Blanco quien desató la guerra entre las familias. La Madre Isabel piensa comunicar la noticia a Camila que cree que ella es su madre. Ezequiel y Fausto armados, se enfrentan.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: amila y Max visitan en la cárcel a otra Rosa Blanco. La mujer le confirma que tuvo una hija hembra y casi la convence. Max cree que miente para aprovechar la situación.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en que la mujer presa es su mamá y la Madre Isabel le dice que Rosa Blanco, presa por asesinar a un hombre, no es su madre. El destino entrelaza a las familias en guerra. Buscan identidad de “El Doliente”

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel propone reunirse en una cena con Camila para decirle que va a sacar de la carcel a "su mamá". La Madre Isabel sólo quiere que Camila sea feliz y para eso le recomienda que forme una familia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En los pasillos se rumora que Max apadrina a Camila a cambio de sexo. Un disparo mantiene a Javier sin reacciones. Se enfrentan Camila y Marcelina, siempre por el asunto de su madre y luego Camila decide disculparse.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Cuernavaca
programme.desc: El mundo de Andy cambia totalmente cuando su madre tiene un accidente. Sin nadie que lo cuide, es llevado a Cuernavaca, a la casa de su desconocida abuela paterna. Mientras su madre se debate entre la vida y la muerte, el niño se enfrentará a la frialdad de su abuela, al mundo seductor y peligroso del hijo del jardinero y a la búsqueda de su padre

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
